---
title: "Template Title"
author: "Your Name"
date: "The Date"
output:
    html_document:
        code_folding: hide
        toc: true
        toc_float: true
        highlight: tango
        number_sections: true
knit: microctr::knit_with_colored_text
params:
    mouse_table: "data/mouse-table.csv"
    spine_trab: "data/spine_trabecular_data.csv"
    met_data: "data/femur_metaphysis_data.csv"
    dia_data: "data/femur_diaphysis_data.csv"
    outliers: !r |
        list(
            spine = c(), 
            met = c(), 
            dia = c()
        )
    groups: !r c()
    digits: 3
    measures: "default"
---

# Background

<!-- START BACKGROUND INFO -->
<!-- Describe the experiment, genotypes/treatments, and hypotheses here. -->


<!-- END BACKGROUND INFO -->

```{r knitr-opts, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
    fig.height = 3
)
options(digits = params$digits)
```

```{r setup, collapse = TRUE}
library(klct)
library(dplyr)
```

```{r read-data, collapse = TRUE}
mouse_table <- read_mouse_table(params$mouse_table)

spine_trab <- read_trabecular(params$spine_trab,
                              mouse_table, site = "Spine")

met_trab <- read_trabecular(params$met_data,
                            mouse_table, site = "Met")
met_cort <- read_cortical(params$met_data,
                          mouse_table, site = "Met")

dia_cort <- read_cortical(params$dia_data,
                          mouse_table, site = "Dia")
```

```{r process-params, collapse = TRUE}
# Determine the group column name
group_col <- intersect(c("Treatment", "Genotype"), names(mouse_table))[1]

# Order the group factor if group names are supplied
if (length(params$groups) > 0) {
    spine_trab[[group_col]] <- factor(spine_trab[[group_col]],
                                      levels = params$groups)
    met_trab[[group_col]] <- factor(met_trab[[group_col]],
                                    levels = params$groups)
    met_cort[[group_col]] <- factor(met_cort[[group_col]],
                                    levels = params$groups)
    dia_cort[[group_col]] <- factor(dia_cort[[group_col]],
                                    levels = params$groups)
}

# Exclude site-specific outliers
if (length(params$outliers$spine) > 0) {
    spine_trab <- spine_trab |> filter(!(AS %in% params$outliers$spine))
}
if (length(params$outliers$met) > 0) {
    met_trab <- met_trab |> filter(!(AS %in% params$outliers$met))
    met_cort <- met_cort |> filter(!(AS %in% params$outliers$met))
}
if (length(params$outliers$dia) > 0) {
    dia_cort <- dia_cort |> filter(!(AS %in% params$outliers$dia))
}

# Collect all unique outlier AS numbers for the summary table
all_outliers <- unique(c(params$outliers$spine, params$outliers$met,
                         params$outliers$dia))

# Resolve the measures parameter:
#   "default" or missing -> NULL (use function defaults)
#   "all"                -> "all" (analyze every detected measure)
measures_param <- if (!exists("measures", where = params) ||
                      identical(params$measures, "default")) NULL else params$measures
```

```{r outlier-table, results = "asis", eval = length(all_outliers) > 0, echo = length(all_outliers) > 0}
cat("## Outliers Excluded\n\n")

outlier_info <- mouse_table |>
    filter(AS %in% all_outliers) |>
    select(AS, Sex, all_of(group_col)) |>
    mutate(
        Spine = ifelse(AS %in% params$outliers$spine, "X", ""),
        Met = ifelse(AS %in% params$outliers$met, "X", ""),
        Dia = ifelse(AS %in% params$outliers$dia, "X", "")
    )

knitr::kable(outlier_info)
```

<!-- START OUTLIER INFO -->
<!-- Describe the reason(s) for excluding outliers, if relevant (e.g., broken met). -->


<!-- END OUTLIER INFO -->

## Original Data

`r xfun::embed_file(params$mouse_table, text = basename(params$mouse_table))`

`r xfun::embed_file(params$spine_trab, text = basename(params$spine_trab))`

`r xfun::embed_file(params$met_data, text = basename(params$met_data))`

`r xfun::embed_file(params$dia_data, text = basename(params$dia_data))`


# Lumbar Vertebra

## Trabecular {.tabset}

### Two-Way (Parametric)

```{r sp-tb-2x2-param, results = "asis"}
compare_groups_2x2(spine_trab, measures = measures_param,
                   test = "parametric") |>
    print_results_2x2()
```

### Two-Way (Nonparametric)

```{r sp-tb-2x2-np, results = "asis"}
compare_groups_2x2(spine_trab, measures = measures_param,
                   test = "nonparametric") |>
    print_results_2x2()
```

### Combined Sexes (Parametric)

```{r sp-tb-combined-param, results = "asis"}
spine_trab |>
    mutate(Sex = "B") |>
    compare_groups(measures = measures_param, test = "parametric") |>
    print_results()
```

### Combined Sexes (Nonparametric)

```{r sp-tb-combined-np, results = "asis"}
spine_trab |>
    mutate(Sex = "B") |>
    compare_groups(measures = measures_param, test = "nonparametric") |>
    print_results()
```

### Two-Way Plots

```{r sp-tb-2x2-plot, fig.width = 4, fig.height = 4}
plot_groups_2x2(spine_trab, measures = measures_param) |> print_plots()
```

### By-Sex Plots

```{r sp-tb-plot}
plot_groups(spine_trab, measures = measures_param) |> print_plots()
```

### Combined Sexes Plots

```{r sp-tb-combined-plot}
spine_trab |>
    mutate(Sex = "B") |>
    plot_groups(measures = measures_param, title = NULL) |>
    print_plots()
```

### Data

```{r sp-tb-dat, results = "asis"}
print_data(spine_trab)
```


# Femoral Metaphysis

## Trabecular {.tabset}

### Two-Way (Parametric)

```{r f-met-tb-2x2-param, results = "asis"}
compare_groups_2x2(met_trab, measures = measures_param,
                   test = "parametric") |>
    print_results_2x2()
```

### Two-Way (Nonparametric)

```{r f-met-tb-2x2-np, results = "asis"}
compare_groups_2x2(met_trab, measures = measures_param,
                   test = "nonparametric") |>
    print_results_2x2()
```

### Combined Sexes (Parametric)

```{r f-met-tb-combined-param, results = "asis"}
met_trab |>
    mutate(Sex = "B") |>
    compare_groups(measures = measures_param, test = "parametric") |>
    print_results()
```

### Combined Sexes (Nonparametric)

```{r f-met-tb-combined-np, results = "asis"}
met_trab |>
    mutate(Sex = "B") |>
    compare_groups(measures = measures_param, test = "nonparametric") |>
    print_results()
```

### Two-Way Plots

```{r f-met-tb-2x2-plot, fig.width = 4, fig.height = 4}
plot_groups_2x2(met_trab, measures = measures_param) |> print_plots()
```

### By-Sex Plots

```{r f-met-tb-plot}
plot_groups(met_trab, measures = measures_param) |> print_plots()
```

### Combined Sexes Plots

```{r f-met-tb-combined-plot}
met_trab |>
    mutate(Sex = "B") |>
    plot_groups(measures = measures_param, title = NULL) |>
    print_plots()
```

### Data

```{r f-met-tb-dat, results = "asis"}
print_data(met_trab)
```


## Cortical {.tabset}

### Two-Way (Parametric)

```{r f-met-ct-2x2-param, results = "asis"}
compare_groups_2x2(met_cort, measures = measures_param,
                   test = "parametric") |>
    print_results_2x2()
```

### Two-Way (Nonparametric)

```{r f-met-ct-2x2-np, results = "asis"}
compare_groups_2x2(met_cort, measures = measures_param,
                   test = "nonparametric") |>
    print_results_2x2()
```

### Combined Sexes (Parametric)

```{r f-met-ct-combined-param, results = "asis"}
met_cort |>
    mutate(Sex = "B") |>
    compare_groups(measures = measures_param, test = "parametric") |>
    print_results()
```

### Combined Sexes (Nonparametric)

```{r f-met-ct-combined-np, results = "asis"}
met_cort |>
    mutate(Sex = "B") |>
    compare_groups(measures = measures_param, test = "nonparametric") |>
    print_results()
```

### Two-Way Plots

```{r f-met-ct-2x2-plot, fig.width = 4, fig.height = 4}
plot_groups_2x2(met_cort, measures = measures_param) |> print_plots()
```

### By-Sex Plots

```{r f-met-ct-plot}
plot_groups(met_cort, measures = measures_param) |> print_plots()
```

### Combined Sexes Plots

```{r f-met-ct-combined-plot}
met_cort |>
    mutate(Sex = "B") |>
    plot_groups(measures = measures_param, title = NULL) |>
    print_plots()
```

### Data

```{r f-met-ct-dat, results = "asis"}
print_data(met_cort)
```


# Femoral Diaphysis

## Cortical {.tabset}

### Two-Way (Parametric)

```{r f-dia-ct-2x2-param, results = "asis"}
compare_groups_2x2(dia_cort, measures = measures_param,
                   test = "parametric") |>
    print_results_2x2()
```

### Two-Way (Nonparametric)

```{r f-dia-ct-2x2-np, results = "asis"}
compare_groups_2x2(dia_cort, measures = measures_param,
                   test = "nonparametric") |>
    print_results_2x2()
```

### Combined Sexes (Parametric)

```{r f-dia-ct-combined-param, results = "asis"}
dia_cort |>
    mutate(Sex = "B") |>
    compare_groups(measures = measures_param, test = "parametric") |>
    print_results()
```

### Combined Sexes (Nonparametric)

```{r f-dia-ct-combined-np, results = "asis"}
dia_cort |>
    mutate(Sex = "B") |>
    compare_groups(measures = measures_param, test = "nonparametric") |>
    print_results()
```

### Two-Way Plots

```{r f-dia-ct-2x2-plot, fig.width = 4, fig.height = 4}
plot_groups_2x2(dia_cort, measures = measures_param) |> print_plots()
```

### By-Sex Plots

```{r f-dia-ct-plot}
plot_groups(dia_cort, measures = measures_param) |> print_plots()
```

### Combined Sexes Plots

```{r f-dia-ct-combined-plot}
dia_cort |>
    mutate(Sex = "B") |>
    plot_groups(measures = measures_param, title = NULL) |>
    print_plots()
```

### Data

```{r f-dia-ct-dat, results = "asis"}
print_data(dia_cort)
```


# Session Info

Time this report was most recently updated: `r format(Sys.time(), '%c')`

```{r session-info, collapse = TRUE}
sessioninfo::session_info()
```
